narrative:
Lima 7A (precinct in Allen County) has 1,139 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
